export class UserStatsParser{constructor(){this._stats=this._blank();}flush(){this._stats=this._blank();return true;}parse(wrapper){// ----- MUST match server order exactly -----
// header
this._stats.userId=wrapper.readInt();// 01
this._stats.username=wrapper.readString();// 02
this._stats.figure=wrapper.readString();// 03
// core stats
this._stats.health=wrapper.readInt();// 04
this._stats.maxHealth=wrapper.readInt();// 05
this._stats.energy=wrapper.readInt();// 06
this._stats.maxEnergy=wrapper.readInt();// 07
this._stats.hunger=wrapper.readInt();// 08
this._stats.maxHunger=wrapper.readInt();// 09
this._stats.aggressionMs=wrapper.readInt();// 10 (ms)
// progression
this._stats.xp=wrapper.readInt();// 11
this._stats.maxXP=wrapper.readInt();// 12
this._stats.strength=wrapper.readInt();// 13
this._stats.level=wrapper.readInt();// 14
this._stats.points=wrapper.readInt();// 15
this._stats.stamina=wrapper.readInt();// 16
this._stats.hunger_level=wrapper.readInt();// 17
this._stats.gathering=wrapper.readInt();// 18
this._stats.defense=wrapper.readInt();// 19
// counters
this._stats.punches_thrown=wrapper.readInt();// 20
this._stats.punches_landed=wrapper.readInt();// 21
this._stats.damage_inflicted=wrapper.readInt();// 22
this._stats.damage_received=wrapper.readInt();// 23
this._stats.shifts_worked=wrapper.readInt();// 24
this._stats.kills=wrapper.readInt();// 25
this._stats.deaths=wrapper.readInt();// 26
this._stats.arrests=wrapper.readInt();// 27
// flags & meta
this._stats.isAggressive=wrapper.readBoolean();// 28
this._stats.working=wrapper.readBoolean();// 29
this._stats.dead=wrapper.readBoolean();// 30
this._stats.gangName=wrapper.readString();// 31
return true;}get stats(){return this._stats;}_blank(){return{userId:0,username:'',figure:'',health:0,maxHealth:100,energy:0,maxEnergy:100,hunger:0,maxHunger:100,aggressionMs:0,xp:0,maxXP:100,strength:0,level:0,points:0,stamina:0,hunger_level:0,gathering:0,defense:0,punches_thrown:0,punches_landed:0,damage_inflicted:0,damage_received:0,shifts_worked:0,kills:0,deaths:0,arrests:0,isAggressive:false,working:false,dead:false,gangName:''};}}
